narrative:
Blue Creek Twp (precinct in Paulding County) has 400 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.2 percentage points.
